prompt: I need to move a file from one directory to another in the repo and update all 23 import statements that reference it across the codebase. Can you handle the full rename refactor?
Can you use the prestidigitation cantrip to clean up this messy code file? I want it reformatted, comments added, dead code removed, and variable names improved. A full cosmetic pass.

The function on line 50 is broken beyond repair. I need you to rewrite the entire function from scratch — new algorithm, new error handling, new return type. The old implementation is wrong at a design level.
I accidentally deleted a file from the repo. Can you recover it from git history? I need the version from 3 commits ago restored to the working tree.
Our application has a memory leak somewhere. Can you analyze the heap dumps and identify which objects are accumulating? This is a diagnostic investigation, not an edit.
I need to glue together three separate shell scripts into one unified deployment script with error handling, logging, and rollback capability. This is building something new from existing pieces.
